entities.name: Talent
entities.context: Describes the ability or skill of individuals.

entities.name: moral optionality
entities.context: Refers to the ability to make moral choices based on individual circumstances.

entities.name: capability gap
entities.context: Describes the disparity between one's ambitions and their actual talents.

entities.name: antisocial behavior
entities.context: Refers to actions that are harmful or lack consideration for others.

entities.name: ambition
entities.context: Describes a strong desire to achieve something.

relationships.context: The capability gap exists between ambition and talent.
The capability gap drives antisocial behavior.
The talented can afford to be good.
